positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a friendly astronaut cat floating through a nebula. The cat is wearing a retro-futuristic spacesuit and surrounded by glowing cosmic dust. Synthwave palette, geometric shapes, vector art, high contrast, 8k illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic, muddy colors, monochrome
